gaps: No full browser screenshot pass was run in this review environment; the prior blocker was verified by executing the browser overview JavaScript render path with a DOM stub and by the focused repository tests.

summary: Accept. The repaired integration head conforms to the approved better-information-ui OpenSpec artifacts. The prior request_changes blocker is resolved: the browser overview renderer now consumes overview.priority_attention and overview.recent_activity and renders action, handoff, reason_for_handoff, timestamp/status/source/round metadata, and one-level-deeper detail controls. Verification performed: python3 scripts/validate-openspec-change.py better-information-ui passed; uv run --with pytest --with 'mcp>=1.13,<2' --with 'PyYAML>=6,<7' pytest scripts/test-web-app-hub.py -q passed with 47 tests; a Node DOM-stub execution of the embedded browser script rendered the priority and recent activity fields successfully. PR readiness: ready, with no blocking issues.
